---
pagetitle: "Julia for Data Science"
listing:
  contents: ["posts/*.qmd", "posts/*/*.qmd", "posts/*/*/*.qmd"]
  type: default # or `default` or `table`; each type has its own set of yaml options to include
  sort: "date desc" # can also sort on more than one field
  categories: false
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, reading-time]
  feed: true
  table-hover: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: 150px
  image-placeholder: /assets/images/hero_bg.svg
---


```{=html}
<div class="bg-primary img-rounded" style="margin-bottom:16px;border-radius:16px;background-image:url(/assets/images/topography.svg);display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;">
  <img src="/assets/images/hero_img.png" style="height:128px; margin: 10% 10% 10% 10%;">
</div>
```
p
